items.headline: Michael Harris II leads surging Braves past slumping Phillies 4-2 for 3-game sweep
items.description: — Michael Harris II homered and had three hits as the streaking Atlanta Braves defeated the slumping Philadelphia Phillies 4-2 on Sunday night to complete a three-game sweep of their NL East rivals.

items.headline: Sabres score 4 third-period goals to beat Bruins in Game 1
items.description: Buffalo overcame a two-goal deficit in the final eight minutes to beat the Bruins 4-3 on Sunday night in the Sabres' first playoff game in 15 years.

items.headline: Sabres score 4 3rd-period goals to beat the Bruins 4-3 in playoff opener
items.description: — Mattias Samuelson scored with 3:24 left and Buffalo overcame a two-goal deficit in the final eight minutes to beat the Boston Bruins 4-3 on Sunday night in the Sabres’ first playoff game in 15 years.

items.headline: Arya comes, Arya sees, Arya conquers in a blaze of mighty sixes
items.description: On another day, Cooper Connolly's 46-ball 87 would have been the innings of the match, but Priyansh Arya's 37-ball 93 gave it no chance
